title: ModuleIdentity
description: Module identity and capability announcement published on sys.module.online

subscribes.description: NATS topics this module subscribes to

publishes.description: NATS topics this module publishes to

selfdev_capable.description: Whether this module supports selfdev mode (runtime code modification)

source_root.description: Path to the module's source code root (if selfdev_capable is true)

binary_path.description: Path to the module's binary (if selfdev_capable is true)
